phrases.intent_en: Ask how to get to the lookout
phrases.text_local: C'est par où pour monter au belvédère ?
phrases.pronunciation: say par OO poor mon-TAY oh bel-vay-DAIR
phrases.cultural_note: The Kondiaronk Belvedere offers a stunning panoramic view of Montréal. The climb takes about 20 minutes on foot from the parking area.

responses.english: Take the main trail, twenty minutes.
responses.phonetic: pruh-NAY luh sahn-TYAY prahn-see-PAHL VAHN mee-NOOT
responses.local: Prenez le sentier principal, vingt minutes.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if the cross is lit at night
phrases.text_local: Est-ce que la croix est illuminée le soir ?
phrases.pronunciation: ess-KUH lah KWAH ay ee-loo-mee-NAY luh SWAHR
phrases.cultural_note: The illuminated cross atop the mountain is a Montréal landmark, visible from much of the city. It's lit every evening.

responses.english: Yes, it is lit up in the evening.
responses.phonetic: wee el eh tee-loo-mee-NAY luh SWAHR
responses.local: Oui, elle est illuminée le soir.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to rent a pedal boat or skis
phrases.text_local: Où est-ce qu'on peut louer de l'équipement ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo ess-KON puh loo-AY duh lay-keep-MAH
phrases.cultural_note: The chalet offers equipment rentals seasonally — pedal boats and canoes in summer, cross-country ski equipment in winter.

responses.english: At Beaver Lake, near the chalet.
responses.phonetic: oh LAK day kas-TOR pray doo shah-LAY
responses.local: Au lac des Castors, près du chalet.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if dogs are allowed on the trails
phrases.text_local: Les chiens sont-ils acceptés dans les sentiers ?
phrases.pronunciation: lay shee-YAN son-TEEL ak-sep-TAY dah lay son-tee-YAY
phrases.cultural_note: Dogs are welcome but must be leashed. The park is very popular with locals walking their dogs year-round.

phrases.intent_en: Ask what time the park closes
phrases.text_local: Le parc ferme à quelle heure ?
phrases.pronunciation: luh PARK fairm ah kel UR
phrases.cultural_note: The park is technically open 24 hours but facilities like the chalet close in the evening. Tam-tams drum circle happens Sundays in summer.
